requirement_topic.en: Belgian Elia/DSO Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz and Regional DSO Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 比利时Elia/配电运营商并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz及区域配电运营商规则
requirement_topic.zht: 比利時Elia/配電運營商併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz及區域配電運營商規則

summary.en: Belgium electricity supply at the transmission level is operated by Elia (TSO), with federal regulation by CREG. At the distribution level, Fluvius operates in Flanders and Brussels Capital Region, ORES operates in Wallonia (excluding Liège area where RESA applies), and RESA operates in the Liège area. The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation. Belgian DSOs typically require project documentation in Dutch (Fluvius — Flanders/Brussels) or French (ORES/RESA — Wallonia).
summary.zh: 比利时输电层面由Elia（输电系统运营商）运营，由CREG负责联邦监管。配电层面，弗兰德和布鲁塞尔首都大区由Fluvius运营，瓦隆（列日地区除外）由ORES运营，列日地区由RESA运营。低压电网环境为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成配电运营商供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。比利时配电运营商通常要求以荷语（Fluvius——弗兰德/布鲁塞尔）或法语（ORES/RESA——瓦隆）提交项目文件。
summary.zht: 比利時輸電層面由Elia（輸電系統運營商）運營，由CREG負責聯邦監管。配電層面，法蘭德斯和布魯塞爾首都大區由Fluvius運營，瓦隆（列日地區除外）由ORES運營，列日地區由RESA運營。低壓電網環境為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成配電運營商供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能品質審查、調試及書面項目驗收。比利時配電運營商通常要求以荷語（Fluvius——法蘭德斯/布魯塞爾）或法語（ORES/RESA——瓦隆）提交項目文件。

standards_or_laws: Elia technical regulations for connection to the high-voltage grid (C10/11) — Belgium
Fluvius grid-connection technical rules and project-acceptance procedures (Flanders / Brussels Capital Region)
ORES grid-connection technical rules (Wallonia, excluding Liège area)
RESA grid-connection technical rules (Liège area, Wallonia)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Belgian 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline. Chinese domestic grid-operator acceptance documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Fluvius, ORES, RESA, or Elia Belgian connection standards.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：比利时230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。中国国内电网运营商验收文件不被接受作为符合Fluvius、ORES、RESA或Elia比利时接入标准的证据。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：比利時230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。中國國內電網運營商驗收文件不被接受作為符合Fluvius、ORES、RESA或Elia比利時接入標準的證據。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for the relevant Belgian DSO (Fluvius, ORES, or RESA) review. Belgian DSOs require project documentation in Dutch (Fluvius) or French (ORES/RESA). Smart charging and demand response functionality required by Belgian grid operators and CREG may also need to be configured and tested. For large commercial installations, Elia coordination may also be required.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按相关比利时配电运营商（Fluvius、ORES或RESA）审查准备。比利时配电运营商要求以荷语（Fluvius）或法语（ORES/RESA）提交项目文件。比利时电网运营商和CREG要求的智能充电和需求响应功能也可能需要配置和测试。对于大型商业安装，可能还须与Elia协调。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按相關比利時配電運營商（Fluvius、ORES或RESA）審查準備。比利時配電運營商要求以荷語（Fluvius）或法語（ORES/RESA）提交項目文件。比利時電網運營商和CREG要求的智能充電和需求響應功能也可能需要配置和測試。對於大型商業安裝，可能還須與Elia協調。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require relevant Belgian DSO (Fluvius/ORES/RESA) project review and acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency; Dutch or French documentation is effectively mandatory for Belgian DSO acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Belgian DSO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Belgium 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Belgium-ready EVSE needs Fluvius/ORES/RESA (or Elia for high-voltage) project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Documentation must be prepared in Dutch for Fluvius connections (Flanders/Brussels) or in French for ORES/RESA connections (Wallonia). Verify current Belgian DSO and CREG grid-connection requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向比利时的EVSE需要Fluvius/ORES/RESA（或高压接入时Elia）项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V、50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。Fluvius接入（弗兰德/布鲁塞尔）须以荷语准备文件，ORES/RESA接入（瓦隆）须以法语准备文件。出货或调试前请直接核实现行比利时配电运营商和CREG并网接入要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向比利時的EVSE需要Fluvius/ORES/RESA（或高壓接入時Elia）項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V、50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。Fluvius接入（法蘭德斯/布魯塞爾）須以荷語準備文件，ORES/RESA接入（瓦隆）須以法語準備文件。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行比利時配電運營商和CREG併網接入要求。
